scripts.build:arm64: bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 ./src/index.tsx --outfile local-llm-manager-arm64 && codesign --sign - --force --entitlements entitlements.plist local-llm-manager-arm64
scripts.build:x64: bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 ./src/index.tsx --outfile local-llm-manager-x64 && codesign --sign - --force --entitlements entitlements.plist local-llm-manager-x64
scripts.build: bun run build:arm64 && bun run build:x64
